历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 36,738, dropping to about 40,511 in 2025, a decline of about 3,773 places in one year, indicating a decrease in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 40,511. In 2024, the Physics Category planned to enroll 3 students, which expanded significantly to 13 in 2025, and in 2026 the plan is 9 students, a reduction of about 30.8% compared to 2025. The reduction in enrollment slots will intensify competition, pushing rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking is approximately 195th (2025), and it did not enter the top 200 in 2026, placing it relatively low among 211 universities. The school's reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 30th (overall list), rated as 'relatively hot', with short video exposure of about 1.38 million, indicating some attention, but not as high as top-tier 211 institutions. Tibet University has no disciplines rated A- or above (the fifth round of discipline evaluation is not included), and its overall academic strength is weak, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Accounting, etc. Among them, Clinical Medicine (recommended) and Computer Science (highly recommended) have high social popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province is about 203,953, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 192,096 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 40,511, the reduction in enrollment by about 30.8% in 2026 pushing rankings forward, the increase in candidates by about 6.2% intensifying competition, and the stable school reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will significantly advance compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 33,233, with a range of 32,733 to 33,733.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science and Technology
- Clinical Medicine
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Resource Exploration Engineering
- Environmental Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 32,733–33,733, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 32,000), you can focus on applying for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 33,700), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.
